patch.value: pm close-many: bulk-close matched items with shared reason and validate-close semantics

update-many --status closed routes through runUpdate, bypassing ensureCloseReason, active-children check, and validate-close. A dedicated close-many closes matched items with proper close semantics, shared reason, optional per-item resolution, dry-run and rollback checkpoint.

pm close-many with filter family (--status/--tag/--sprint/--type) closes each via runClose semantics; --dry-run previews; rollback checkpoint restores; active-child orphan check per item; compact projectMutationResult output; MCP+completion+docs updated.

update-many --status closed routes through runUpdate, bypassing ensureCloseReason, active-children check, and validate-close. A dedicated close-many closes matched items with proper close semantics, shared reason, optional per-item resolution, dry-run and rollback checkpoint.
